data.content:
### CommandStartOpts - Options for Starting a Command

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.2.0/commands/page.mdx

Defines the configuration options for starting a new command within the sandbox.

```APIDOC
## CommandStartOpts Interface

### Description
Options for starting a new command.

### Properties
- **background** (boolean) - Optional - If true, starts command in the background and the method returns immediately. You can use CommandHandle.wait to wait for the command to finish.
- **cwd** (string) - Optional - Working directory for the command. Defaults to the home directory of the user used to start the command.
- **envs** (object) - Optional - Environment variables used for the command. Overrides the default environment variables from `Sandbox` constructor. Defaults to `{}`.
- **onStderr** (function) - Optional - Callback for command stderr output. Accepts a string `data` and returns `void | Promise<void>`.
- **onStdout** (function) - Optional - Callback for command stdout output. Accepts a string `data` and returns `void | Promise<void>`.
- **requestTimeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for requests to the API in milliseconds. Defaults to 30,000 (30 seconds).
- **timeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for the command in milliseconds. Defaults to 60,000 (60 seconds).
- **user** (Username) - Optional - User to run the command as. Defaults to the user that started the command.
```

--------------------------------

### CommandStartOpts Interface

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.1.0/commands/page.mdx

Defines the options available when starting a new command within the sandbox. This includes background execution, environment variables, and output callbacks.

```APIDOC
## Interfaces

### CommandStartOpts

Options for starting a new command.

#### Properties
- **background** (boolean) - Optional - If true, starts the command in the background. Defaults to false.
- **cwd** (string) - Optional - The working directory for the command. Defaults to the user's home directory.
- **envs** (Record<string, string>) - Optional - Environment variables to set for the command. Overrides defaults.
- **onStderr** (function(data: string): void | Promise<void>) - Optional - Callback function for stderr output.
- **onStdout** (function(data: string): void | Promise<void>) - Optional - Callback function for stdout output.
- **requestTimeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for API requests in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.
- **timeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for the command itself in milliseconds. Defaults to 60000.
- **user** (Username) - Optional - The user to run the command as. Defaults to the user running the sandbox.

#### Default Values
- `cwd`: User's home directory
- `envs`: `{}` (empty object)
- `requestTimeoutMs`: `30000` (30 seconds)
- `timeoutMs`: `60000` (60 seconds)
- `user`: User running the sandbox
```

--------------------------------

### CommandStartOpts Interface

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.2.5/commands/page.mdx

Defines the options available when starting a new command within the E2B environment.

```APIDOC
## Interface: CommandStartOpts

### Description
Options for starting a new command.

### Properties
- **background**? (boolean) - Optional - If true, starts command in the background and the method returns immediately. You can use `CommandHandle.wait` to wait for the command to finish.
- **cwd**? (string) - Optional - Working directory for the command. Default: home directory of the user used to start the command.
- **envs**? (object) - Optional - Environment variables used for the command. This overrides the default environment variables from `Sandbox` constructor. Default: `{}`.
- **onStderr**? (function) - Optional - Callback for command stderr output. Accepts `data` (string) and returns `void` or `Promise<void>`.
- **onStdout**? (function) - Optional - Callback for command stdout output. Accepts `data` (string) and returns `void` or `Promise<void>`.
- **requestTimeoutMs**? (number) - Optional - Timeout for requests to the API in milliseconds. Default: 30000 (30 seconds).
- **timeoutMs**? (number) - Optional - Timeout for the command in milliseconds. Default: 60000 (60 seconds).
- **user**? (string) - Optional - User to run the command as. Default: 'user'.
```

--------------------------------

### CommandStartOpts Interface - TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.0.6/commands/page.mdx

The `CommandStartOpts` interface defines the configuration options for starting a new command. It includes settings for background execution, working directory, environment variables, callbacks for stdout/stderr, request timeouts, command timeouts, and the user to run the command as. Some properties have default values.

```typescript
interface CommandStartOpts {
  background?: boolean;
  cwd?: string;
  envs?: Record<string, string>;
  onStderr?: (data: string) => void | Promise<void>;
  onStdout?: (data: string) => void | Promise<void>;
  requestTimeoutMs?: number;
  timeoutMs?: number;
  user?: Username;
}
```

--------------------------------

### CommandStartOpts Interface

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.2.1/commands/page.mdx

Options for starting a new command within the sandbox environment, including execution context and output handling.

```APIDOC
## Interface: CommandStartOpts

### Description
Options to configure the execution of a new command, including its environment, working directory, and output callbacks.

### Properties
- **background**? (boolean) - Optional - If true, the command runs in the background and the method returns immediately.
- **cwd**? (string) - Optional - The working directory for the command. Defaults to the user's home directory.
- **envs**? (Record<string, string>) - Optional - Environment variables for the command. Overrides defaults from the Sandbox constructor. Defaults to an empty object.
- **onStderr**? (function) - Optional - A callback function executed when stderr output is received. Accepts `data: string` and returns `void | Promise<void>`.
- **onStdout**? (function) - Optional - A callback function executed when stdout output is received. Accepts `data: string` and returns `void | Promise<void>`.
- **requestTimeoutMs**? (number) - Optional - Timeout for API requests in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000ms (30 seconds).
- **timeoutMs**? (number) - Optional - Timeout for the command execution itself in milliseconds. Defaults to 60000ms (60 seconds).
- **user**? (Username) - Optional - The user identity under which to run the command. Defaults to the current user.

### Extended by
- `CommandConnectOpts`
```

--------------------------------

### CommandStartOpts Interface

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.5.0/commands/page.mdx

Defines the options available when starting a new command within the E2B environment. This includes background execution, working directory, environment variables, and callbacks for output streams.

```APIDOC
## Interface: CommandStartOpts

### Description
Options for starting a new command.

### Properties
- **background** (boolean) - Optional - If true, starts command in the background. Defaults to false.
- **cwd** (string) - Optional - Working directory for the command. Defaults to the user's home directory.
- **envs** (Record<string, string>) - Optional - Environment variables for the command. Overrides defaults. Defaults to {}.
- **onStderr** (function) - Optional - Callback for command stderr output.
  - Parameters:
    - **data** (string) - Stderr output data.
  - Returns: void | Promise<void>
- **onStdout** (function) - Optional - Callback for command stdout output.
  - Parameters:
    - **data** (string) - Stdout output data.
  - Returns: void | Promise<void>
- **requestTimeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for API requests in milliseconds. Defaults to 30000.
- **timeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for the command in milliseconds. Defaults to 60000.
- **user** (Username) - Optional - User to run the command as. Defaults to the current user.
```

--------------------------------

### Set Command User

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.9.1/commands/page.mdx

Specifies the user under which a command should be executed. This option is part of the CommandStartOpts interface and defaults to the user who started the command.

```typescript
optional user: Username;

// Default
// user
```

--------------------------------

### CommandRequestOpts Interface

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.7.1/commands/page.mdx

Specifies options for making requests related to commands. This interface is extended by `CommandStartOpts` and primarily includes the `requestTimeoutMs` property for setting timeouts on API requests.

```typescript
interface CommandRequestOpts {
  requestTimeoutMs?: number;
}
```

--------------------------------

### CommandConnectOpts Type Alias - TypeScript

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.0.6/commands/page.mdx

The `CommandConnectOpts` type alias is a composite type used for options when connecting to an existing command. It combines settings for stderr/stdout callbacks and command timeout from `CommandStartOpts` with request timeout options from `CommandRequestOpts`.

```typescript
type CommandConnectOpts: Pick<CommandStartOpts, "onStderr" | "onStdout" | "timeoutMs"> & CommandRequestOpts;
```
